title: GEEZY Giant Dough Bucket - Non Toxic Modelling Clay for Kids - 30 Pieces, 10 Colours, 1.5 Kg Crafting Dough Tub - Coloured Clay for Kids' Arts and Crafts
features: VIBRANT COLOURS FOR CREATIVE PLAY: Our clay dough bucket come with 10 vibrant colours, perfect for letting your child's imagination run wild.
SAFE & NON-TOXIC MATERIAL: Made from non-toxic modelling clay, our crafting dough is safe for kids to enjoy.
SOFT & EASY TO MOLD: Our modelling clay for kids is soft, easy to mold, and provides endless hours of creative fun.
LARGE TUB: This dough set comes in a large tub that ensures there's enough clay for big projects and group play, which is also great for storing crafting tools and accessories.
Specifications: Packaging Dimensions: Height 14.3cm, Depth 17.5cm, Width 17.5cm, Weight 1620gm / Item Dimensions: Height 14.3cm, Depth 17.5cm, Width 17.5cm / Minimum Age: 3 Years+
